summary: Emits a saved message payload when clicked or triggered.
description: Message is a Max/Pd-like message box. Click or bang emits the stored message; set <message> replaces the runtime message silently.
runtimeBehavior: click, in, or bang emits the saved message payload. set updates runtime message text without output. Inspector edits are graph patches, not runtime control events.

ports.description: Accepts any message and emits the current message payload.
Updates the runtime message payload without output.
Outputs the saved selector plus typed atoms as a message payload.

params.description: Saved message box text parsed into selector plus atoms at runtime.
Optional message channel name updated whenever the message emits.
Optional message channel name used to receive routed message updates.

example.title: Trigger a string message
example.description: Use Bang Button to emit the saved message text on demand.
